{"type":"MediaWikiError/Not_Found","title":"rest-nonexistent-title","method":"get","detail":"The specified page (Nixdaexistiert) does not exist","uri":"/w/rest.php/v1/page/Nixdaexistiert/html","errorKey":"rest-nonexistent-title","messageTranslations":{"de":"Die angegebene Seite (Nixdaexistiert) existiert nicht","en":"The specified page (Nixdaexistiert) does not exist"},"httpCode":404,"httpReason":"Not Found"}
